# dpi

The goal of `dpi` is to provide a programmatic interface to data
products built within Data-as-a-Product framework

## Installation

For released version

``` r
remotes::install_github("amashadihossein/dpi")
```

For dev version

``` r
remotes::install_github("amashadihossein/dpi", ref = "dev")
```

## Example

``` r
library(dpi)

# Add your AWS profile name. If you don't have a named profile, you can provide your AWS credentials
aws_creds <- creds_set_aws(
  key = Sys.getenv("AWS_KEY"),
  secret = Sys.getenv("AWS_SECRET")
)

# Get the list of board parameters
board_params <- board_params_set_s3(
  bucket_name = "bucket_name",
  region = "specific_region" # e.g. "us-east-1"
)

# Connect to the board
board_object <- dp_connect(board_params = board_params, creds = aws_creds)

# List what's available on the board
dp_list(board_object = board_object)

# Retrieve the latest data. Alternatively retrieve specific version by passing
# the version id to dp_get
dp_get(
  board_object = board_object,
  data_name = "dp-studyid_branchid",
  version = "specific_version" # e.g. "c5a51c3"
)
```

## Related documentation

- `daapr`: <https://amashadihossein.github.io/daapr/>
- `dpbuild`: <https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpbuild/>
- `dpdeploy`: <https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpdeploy/>

# Package index

## All functions

- [`board_params_set_labkey()`](https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpi/reference/board_params_set_labkey.md)
  : Create formatted parameters that specify a LabKey board
- [`board_params_set_local()`](https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpi/reference/board_params_set_local.md)
  : Create formatted parameters that specify a local storage board
- [`board_params_set_s3()`](https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpi/reference/board_params_set_s3.md)
  : Create formatted parameters that specify an s3 bucket board
- [`creds_set_aws()`](https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpi/reference/creds_set_aws.md)
  : Create formatted credentials for connecting to an s3 bucket board
- [`creds_set_labkey()`](https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpi/reference/creds_set_labkey.md)
  : Create formatted credentials for connecting to a LabKey board
- [`dp_connect()`](https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpi/reference/dp_connect.md)
  : Connect to the data product pin board
- [`dp_get()`](https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpi/reference/dp_get.md)
  : Get the data product from the remote pin board
- [`dp_list()`](https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpi/reference/dp_list.md)
  : List data products on a remote pin board
- [`dp_make_params()`](https://amashadihossein.github.io/dpi/reference/dp_make_params.md)
  : Make dp params to connect to the Data Product Board
